_comment: 8 concrete developer tasks. `requires` names the API capability the task needs; a task whose capability is undocumented in the current docs variant is expected to fail, and its failure is attributed to the named gap. Checkers live in app/checkers.py keyed by id.

tasks.title: Store an invoice document
tasks.instruction: In the 'reports' collection, store a document with content 'Invoice #2001 for Manicule — DevRel retainer.' and metadata {"category": "invoice", "amount": 4200, "status": "unpaid"}.

tasks.title: Store a note document
tasks.instruction: In the 'reports' collection, store a document with content 'Kickoff complete.' and metadata {"category": "note", "status": "open"}.

tasks.title: Count all documents
tasks.instruction: Report the total number of documents in the 'workspace' collection.

tasks.title: Read the first page
tasks.instruction: List the 'workspace' collection with a page size (limit) of 5 and report how many documents you received in that page.

tasks.title: Count contacts (metadata filter)
tasks.instruction: Report how many documents in the 'workspace' collection have metadata category equal to 'contact'. Use the API to answer precisely.

tasks.title: Paginate every document
tasks.instruction: Retrieve EVERY document in the 'workspace' collection across all pages and report the total count of distinct document IDs you collected.
